cad_masters.notes: First parametric master for this repo. Melody bore + drone bore + octagon body/facet envelope, equation-driven pentatonic-minor tone-hole schedule. Duct/fipple/window/voicing geometry out of scope.
Row-per-member family table (bore_id_in, total_length_in, body_od_in, facet_side_in, drone_bore_in); drives the .scad and the auto-generators.
Parametric source of truth (284 formulas, Master_Inputs sheet); current dimensional authority for the whole family.
Source-only (not executed this pass); L2 evidence. Deployed read-only to Wolfram Cloud and embedded live in explorer.html.

notes: No body/bore/tone-hole/drone-block DXF or CAD export is released yet (dxf-shop-authority.md still lists these as missing; DXF-REV-001 and FAB-BORE-009 remain blocked). cad/drone-flutes.scad is a new envelope master, not a substitute for that reviewed export chain. Gate A (Alpha workspace compile) not yet run.
